query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_rows, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN monarquia_republica IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as monarquia_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN division_territorial IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as division_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sistema_pensiones IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pensiones_count
FROM public.respuestas;
